name: Aircraft Battle 2024
description: You are a ship on a crucial mission to obliterate any aircraft spotted in the vast skies. Utilize the radar located at the center of the screen, and direct the mouse towards the targeted aircraft to initiate automatic shooting. Your precision and agility are paramount in ensuring the success of your mission. Stay vigilant and be prepared to engage in intense aerial combat as you navigate through the challenges of the sky. Only your skills can guarantee victory in this high-stakes battle. Website Developer <a href='https://www.crazygamesonline.com'>https://www.crazygamesonline.com</a>
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
tags: Aircraft, airplane, HTML5, iPad, iPhone, Mentolatux, Mobile, Shooting, Unity3D, WebGL
